title: Require all three axes for explicit build origin
description:
## Evidence
`BuildGoal.HasExplicitOrigin` (Agent.Planning/Goals/BuildGoal.cs:56) returns true if ANY axis is present. `BuildGoalDecomposer` (line 33-38) fills missing axes with `?? 0`. `ReadOriginFact` returns 0 for unparseable facts with `found=true`.

## Impact
A build with only X specified silently becomes (X, 0, 0). A malformed stored origin fact is treated as valid instead of falling back.

## Fix
1. Treat explicit origin as valid only when all three axes are present
2. Treat malformed stored origin facts as missing (not as 0)
3. Log a warning with the blueprint ID and missing axes
4. Consolidate the two separate ReadOriginFact implementations (BuildGoalDecomposer + HtnPlanner)

## Verification
Verified against codebase 2026-06-23. See `Data/Pages/audits/msa-audit-verification-6-23.md` sections F9 and O1.
